oneWorkspacePerSubject: One workspace per subject. Aura tunes its teaching style to how **you** learn — pick what applies.
pickAnyThatApply: Pick any that apply. Aura adapts the lesson style accordingly.
dyslexiaDesc: Lexend font, generous spacing, audio-first cards, phonetic vocab.
adhdDesc: Short cards, kinesthetic input, attention-aware breaks, focus mode.
whatToLearn: What do you want to learn?
plainLanguage: Plain language. Don't worry about getting it right — Aura will ask follow-ups.
howMuchKnow: How much do you already know?
whyLearnThis: Why do you want to learn this?
curiousPodcast: Curious; came up in a podcast
clickToGenerate: Click below to generate a lesson plan for {{topic}}.
lessonsForTopic: {{count}} lessons for {{topic}}. The order adapts as Aura learns what works.
